description: Local HTTPS certificate management via mkcert. Installs a trusted root CA into the Windows/macOS/Linux certificate store on first run (one-time admin prompt), then generates per-domain cert.pem + key.pem pairs under ~/.wdc/ssl/sites/{domain}/ whenever a site enables SSL. Supports wildcard SANs (*.myapp.loc) so alias subdomains share the parent cert. The SiteOrchestrator calls GenerateCert automatically on site create/update when sslEnabled=true — no manual cert management needed. Certs are locally trusted: Chrome, Firefox, Edge, and curl all accept them without --insecure flags.
author: NKS
